issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incomplete. The card effect requires a conditional check ('If you have 0 Life cards') followed by adding up to 2 Character cards with cost 5 to Life cards. Current DSL only trashes 1 card with no conditional logic or secondary action.

Missing conditional 'thenActions' that should check 'HasLifeCards count:0' and then execute an action to add Character cards (cost 5) to Life cards. The 'If you have 0 Life cards' clause must be represented.
Condition should include '[Once Per Turn]' restriction, which is not captured in the DSL. This requires a turn-based limiter.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x2] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If you have 0 Life cards, add up to 2 Character cards with a cost of 5 from your hand or trash to the top of your Life cards face-up.
